understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the '+' goal gem tile in each level while avoiding spike tiles ('u', 'v') that cause immediate failure. I had a limited turn budget (50 per attempt, 2 attempts per level) and needed to navigate efficiently toward the goal.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT), with automatic downward (or upward) falling after each move due to gravity. CLICK removed breakable 'x' tiles to open paths downward. UNDO could revert the previous action. Spike tiles were instant-death hazards. The level ended when reaching the goal gem or landing on a spike.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the '+' goal gem tile in each level while avoiding spike tiles ('u', 'v') that cause immediate failure. I had a limited turn budget (50 per attempt, 2 attempts per level) and needed to navigate efficiently toward the goal.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT), with automatic downward (or upward) falling after each move due to gravity. CLICK removed breakable 'x' tiles to open paths downward. UNDO could revert the previous action. Spike tiles were instant-death hazards. The level ended when reaching the goal gem or landing on a spike.
